Copyright (C) 2026 KMD

  -g, --gatewayUrl        Gateway URL.

                          Credentials.

                          Credentials.

  -p, --providerId        Provider ID in Logic.

  -v, --verbose           Logs everything.

  -o, --output            Output format.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
